title: Saturday Citations: Cruise ship pathogen spread in ancient Rome; Plus: Pomegranates, retinal implants
description: This week, researchers reported that malaria influenced population distribution in Africa thousands of years ago. Mathematicians at MIT report that classical physics formulations can explain quantum phenomena. And a study found that electron spin causes mirror-image molecules to behave differently from one another.

title: The Untold Secrets of Nath Sampradaya & Shabar Mantras | Powerful Ancient Wisdom |Ft.Anil Chaturvedi
description: What are the hidden secrets of the Nath Sampradaya, and why are Gorakhnath’s Shabar mantras considered so powerful? In this intriguing conversation, Anil Chaturvedi reveals lesser-known aspects of ancient spiritual practices. Are these mantras symbolic, or do they hold real transformative power? Why have these teachings remained hidden for so long? This discussion dives into mysticism, tradition, and untold knowledge. Watch till the end to explore a rarely discussed spiritual path.#timesmantra #nathsampradaya #gorakhnath #shabarmantra #spiritualsecrets #tantra #mantra #sanatandharma #ancientknowledge

title: Know abouth an ancient Semkhor village located in the Dima Hasao district of Assam
description: ডিমা হাছাও জিলাৰ এখন প্ৰাচীন গাঁও- চেমখৰ । আন গাঁৱতকৈ কিহত পৃথক এই গাঁওখন ?

title: Ancient giant Octopuses may have ruled the oceans 100 million years ago — New study reveals massive marine predators
description: New research suggests giant octopuses up to 19 metres long may have ruled ancient oceans 100 million years ago, challenging beliefs about prehistoric marine predators.
